TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Albert II(ťėŅÁąĺŤ≤ĚšļĆšłĖ ) = Mntucing hngkawas 1958 idas 3 jiyax 14 ka Albert II ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Monaco ta sayang o kiya ka Albert II, pnaah hngkawas 2005 idas 4 jiyax 6 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Albert II, mndungus balay hangan niya pa Albert Alexandre Louis Pierre Grimaldi (kari France: Albert Alexandre Louis Pierre Grimaldi, kngkawas 1958 idas 3 diyax 14Ôľć), mntuting Monaco Cinwangkong, Bukung Monaco saya, Bukung Grimaldi mi Monaco Kongkwo Qnlhangan Weynso. Hiya ka murux bay laqi snaw wada mnrdang Bukung Monaco Rainier III mi Wangfey Grace Kelly, qbsuran niya qridin Hannowa Wangfey Caroline Kongcu, swayi niya qridin ka Stephanie Kongcu. Kngkawas 2005 idas 3 diyax 7 Rainier III wada mchdil bay narux niya wada swarang nganguc daaw, Albert II u mniq idas 3 diyax 31 daw wada pklan phiyu Secng. Idas 4 diyax 6, Bukung Rainier u uka brahan pkmalu mi wada mrdang, kiya u mpBukung ka Albert pa wada mburah Bukung Monaco. Albert II ka pnsliyan csan Uka Rudan Kwoci na kumong, kiya mi tumal knou bay mdhu pnsliyan so Hwanpaw, Tiyu, Ucilung Ida nkiya uri. Kngkawas 2020 idas 3 diyax 19, Albert II u wada ruwan Cyokoku Uhan Narux Brah (COVID-19), kiya ka knkana qnlangan mwaya bay wada ruwan Cyokoku Uhan Narux Brah (COVID-19) na Qnlhangan Weynso. Llaqi Bukungh Albert II u niqan 2 pnklanan llaqi niya nganguc: Msupu Amirika niqan snaw na ka qridin Mala Rotoro niqan 1 laqi dha: Laqi qridin: Jazmin Grace Grimaldi, kngkawas 1992 idas 3 diyax 4 Mnsupu Toko brah qalux wouwa skoki Nicole Coster niqan 1 laqi dha nganguc: Laqi: Alexandre Eric St√©phane Coste kngkawas 2003 idas 8 diyax 24 mntuting France Paris St. Vincent Paul Singhu Byoying. Bukungh Albert II tuhuy Carunni Cinwangfey laqi dha u mniq kngkawas 2014 idas 12 diyax 10 mniq Monaco Grace Wangfey Byoying mntuting, 1 laqi rabu snaw mi 1 laqi rabu qridin tnrurun ka llaqi dha. Laqi qridin: Gabriella Th√©r√®se Marie, Monaco Kongcu, Karad qridin Pocwey, tuhuy swayi niya snaw pa tnrurun. Laqi snaw: 'Jacques Honor√© Rainier, Manaco mnBukung, Pawks Hocwey, tuhuy qbsuran niya qridin u tnrurun. Hangan snpruwan Hangan snpruwan Bukung Albert II pa niqan: Monaco Cinwang, Warwen Kongcwey, Estuteville Kongcwey, Masarin Kongcwey, Mayena Kongcwey, Posayen Cngpaw Cyunwang, Pawks Hocwey, Silimacalan Hocwey, Ciskar Hocwey, Peyrli Hocwey, Poriniyak Pocwey, Kalads Pocwey, Feylrit, Peyrfu, Tanenherosmongt Pocwey, Torini Pocwey, Longkjweymo Pocwey, Kraytay Pocwey, Karweyney Nancwey, Piyi Nancwey, Llusyopir nancwey, Angpiay nancwey, Artcik Nancwey, Sngro Nancwey, Masay Nancwey, Isneymu Ringcu, Sngreymi Ringcu, Matiwong Tyeyn. Pnyahan pnataas ÁôĹŤęáÁŅ†ŚĪŹ Link Kevin I, Tanzania mlikuy
S.PHON: = alb…ô…ĺt ii(***** ) = mntu ¶iŇč ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax ** ka alb…ô…ĺt ii ga, …ômpklaw ka ńßija. bukuŇč klwaan mona ¶o ta sajaŇč o kija ka alb…ô…ĺt ii, pnaańß ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax * pn…ĺa…üiŇč kmlawa klwaan. alb…ô…ĺt ii, mnduŇčus balaj ńßaŇčan nija pa alb…ô…ĺt al…ôxand…ĺ…ô louis pi…ô…ĺ…ĺ…ô g…ĺimaldi (ka…ĺi *…ĺan ¶…ô: alb…ô…ĺt al…ôxand…ĺ…ô louis pi…ô…ĺ…ĺ…ô g…ĺimaldi, kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ***), mntutiŇč mona ¶o ¶inwaŇčkoŇč, bukuŇč mona ¶o saja, bukuŇč g…ĺimaldi mi mona ¶o koŇčkwo qnlńßaŇčan w…ônso. ńßija ka mu…ĺux baj laqi snaw wada mn…ĺdaŇč bukuŇč mona ¶o …ĺaini…ô…ĺ iii mi waŇč*…ô g…ĺa ¶…ô k…ôllj, qbsu…ĺan nija q…ĺidin ńßannowa waŇč*…ô ¶a…ĺolin…ô koŇč ¶u, swaji nija q…ĺidin ka st…ôpńßani…ô koŇč ¶u. kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax * …ĺaini…ô…ĺ iii wada m ¶ńßdil baj na…ĺux nija wada swa…ĺaŇč ŇčaŇču ¶ daaw, alb…ô…ĺt ii u mniq idas * dijax ** daw wada pklan pńßiju s…ô ¶Ňč. idas * dijax *, bukuŇč …ĺaini…ô…ĺ u uka b…ĺańßan pkmalu mi wada m…ĺdaŇč, kija u mpbukuŇč ka alb…ô…ĺt pa wada mbu…ĺańß bukuŇč mona ¶o. alb…ô…ĺt ii ka pnslijan ¶san uka …ĺudan kwo ¶i na kumoŇč, kija mi tumal knou baj mdńßu pnslijan so ńßwanpaw, tiju, u ¶iluŇč ida nkija u…ĺi. kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax **, alb…ô…ĺt ii u wada …ĺuwan ¶jokoku uńßan na…ĺux b…ĺańß ( ¶o*id-**), kija ka knkana qnlaŇčan mwaja baj wada …ĺuwan ¶jokoku uńßan na…ĺux b…ĺańß ( ¶o*id-**) na qnlńßaŇčan w…ônso. llaqi bukuŇčńß alb…ô…ĺt ii u niqan * pnklanan llaqi nija ŇčaŇču ¶: msupu ami…ĺika niqan snaw na ka q…ĺidin mala …ĺoto…ĺo niqan * laqi dńßa: laqi q…ĺidin: …üa*min g…ĺa ¶…ô g…ĺimaldi, kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax * mnsupu toko b…ĺańß qalux wouwa skoki ni ¶ol…ô ¶ost…ô…ĺ niqan * laqi dńßa ŇčaŇču ¶: laqi: al…ôxand…ĺ…ô …ô…ĺi ¶ st*pńßan…ô ¶ost…ô kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** mntutiŇč *…ĺan ¶…ô pa…ĺis st. *in ¶…ônt paul siŇčńßu bjojiŇč. bukuŇčńß alb…ô…ĺt ii tuńßuj ¶a…ĺunni ¶inwaŇč*…ô laqi dńßa u mniq kŇčkawas **** idas ** dijax ** mniq mona ¶o g…ĺa ¶…ô waŇč*…ô bjojiŇč mntutiŇč, * laqi …ĺabu snaw mi * laqi …ĺabu q…ĺidin tn…ĺu…ĺun ka llaqi dńßa. laqi q…ĺidin: gab…ĺi…ôlla tńß*…ĺ*s…ô ma…ĺi…ô, mona ¶o koŇč ¶u, ka…ĺad q…ĺidin po ¶w…ô, tuńßuj swaji nija snaw pa tn…ĺu…ĺun. laqi snaw: '…üa ¶qu…ôs ńßono…ĺ* …ĺaini…ô…ĺ, mana ¶o mnbukuŇč, pawks ńßo ¶w…ô, tuńßuj qbsu…ĺan nija q…ĺidin u tn…ĺu…ĺun. ńßaŇčan snp…ĺuwan ńßaŇčan snp…ĺuwan bukuŇč alb…ô…ĺt ii pa niqan: mona ¶o ¶inwaŇč, wa…ĺw…ôn koŇč ¶w…ô, …ôstut…ô*ill…ô koŇč ¶w…ô, masa…ĺin koŇč ¶w…ô, maj…ôna koŇč ¶w…ô, posaj…ôn ¶Ňčpaw ¶junwaŇč, pawks ńßo ¶w…ô, silima ¶alan ńßo ¶w…ô, ¶iska…ĺ ńßo ¶w…ô, p…ô…ĺli ńßo ¶w…ô, po…ĺinijak po ¶w…ô, kalads po ¶w…ô, *…ôl…ĺit, p…ô…ĺ*u, tan…ônńß…ô…ĺosmoŇčt po ¶w…ô, to…ĺini po ¶w…ô, loŇčk…üw…ômo po ¶w…ô, k…ĺajtaj po ¶w…ô, ka…ĺw…ôn…ô nan ¶w…ô, piji nan ¶w…ô, llusjopi…ĺ nan ¶w…ô, aŇčpiaj nan ¶w…ô, a…ĺt ¶ik nan ¶w…ô, sŇč…ĺo nan ¶w…ô, masaj nan ¶w…ô, isn…ômu …ĺiŇč ¶u, sŇč…ĺ…ômi …ĺiŇč ¶u, matiwoŇč tj…ôn. pnjańßan pnataas **** link k…ô*in i, tan*ania mlikuj
S.FORM: = Albert II(ťėŅÁąĺŤ≤ĚšļĆšłĖ ) = Mntucing hngkawas 1958 idas 3 jiyax 14 ka Albert II ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Monaco ta sayang o kiya ka Albert II, pnaah hngkawas 2005 idas 4 jiyax 6 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Albert II, mndungus balay hangan niya pa Albert Alexandre Louis Pierre Grimaldi (kari France: Albert Alexandre Louis Pierre Grimaldi, kngkawas 1958 idas 3 diyax 14Ôľć), mntuting Monaco Cinwangkong, Bukung Monaco saya, Bukung Grimaldi mi Monaco Kongkwo Qnlhangan Weynso. Hiya ka murux bay laqi snaw wada mnrdang Bukung Monaco Rainier III mi Wangfey Grace Kelly, qbsuran niya qridin Hannowa Wangfey Caroline Kongcu, swayi niya qridin ka Stephanie Kongcu. Kngkawas 2005 idas 3 diyax 7 Rainier III wada mchdil bay narux niya wada swarang nganguc daaw, Albert II u mniq idas 3 diyax 31 daw wada pklan phiyu Secng. Idas 4 diyax 6, Bukung Rainier u uka brahan pkmalu mi wada mrdang, kiya u mpBukung ka Albert pa wada mburah Bukung Monaco. Albert II ka pnsliyan csan Uka Rudan Kwoci na kumong, kiya mi tumal knou bay mdhu pnsliyan so Hwanpaw, Tiyu, Ucilung Ida nkiya uri. Kngkawas 2020 idas 3 diyax 19, Albert II u wada ruwan Cyokoku Uhan Narux Brah (COVID-19), kiya ka knkana qnlangan mwaya bay wada ruwan Cyokoku Uhan Narux Brah (COVID-19) na Qnlhangan Weynso. Llaqi Bukungh Albert II u niqan 2 pnklanan llaqi niya nganguc: Msupu Amirika niqan snaw na ka qridin Mala Rotoro niqan 1 laqi dha: Laqi qridin: Jazmin Grace Grimaldi, kngkawas 1992 idas 3 diyax 4 Mnsupu Toko brah qalux wouwa skoki Nicole Coster niqan 1 laqi dha nganguc: Laqi: Alexandre Eric St√©phane Coste kngkawas 2003 idas 8 diyax 24 mntuting France Paris St. Vincent Paul Singhu Byoying. Bukungh Albert II tuhuy Carunni Cinwangfey laqi dha u mniq kngkawas 2014 idas 12 diyax 10 mniq Monaco Grace Wangfey Byoying mntuting, 1 laqi rabu snaw mi 1 laqi rabu qridin tnrurun ka llaqi dha. Laqi qridin: Gabriella Th√©r√®se Marie, Monaco Kongcu, Karad qridin Pocwey, tuhuy swayi niya snaw pa tnrurun. Laqi snaw: 'Jacques Honor√© Rainier, Manaco mnBukung, Pawks Hocwey, tuhuy qbsuran niya qridin u tnrurun. Hangan snpruwan Hangan snpruwan Bukung Albert II pa niqan: Monaco Cinwang, Warwen Kongcwey, Estuteville Kongcwey, Masarin Kongcwey, Mayena Kongcwey, Posayen Cngpaw Cyunwang, Pawks Hocwey, Silimacalan Hocwey, Ciskar Hocwey, Peyrli Hocwey, Poriniyak Pocwey, Kalads Pocwey, Feylrit, Peyrfu, Tanenherosmongt Pocwey, Torini Pocwey, Longkjweymo Pocwey, Kraytay Pocwey, Karweyney Nancwey, Piyi Nancwey, Llusyopir nancwey, Angpiay nancwey, Artcik Nancwey, Sngro Nancwey, Masay Nancwey, Isneymu Ringcu, Sngreymi Ringcu, Matiwong Tyeyn. ¶ńßdil baj na…ĺux nija wada swa…ĺaŇč ŇčaŇču ¶ daaw, alb…ô…ĺt ii u mniq idas * dijax ** daw wada pklan pńßiju s…ô ¶Ňč. idas * dijax *, bukuŇč …ĺaini…ô…ĺ u uka b…ĺańßan pkmalu mi wada m…ĺdaŇč, kija u mpbukuŇč ka alb…ô…ĺt pa wada mbu…ĺańß bukuŇč mona ¶o. alb…ô…ĺt ii ka pnslijan ¶san uka …ĺudan kwo ¶i na kumoŇč, kija mi tumal knou baj mdńßu pnslijan so ńßwanpaw, tiju, u ¶iluŇč ida nkija u…ĺi. kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax **, alb…ô…ĺt ii u wada …ĺuwan ¶jokoku uńßan na…ĺux b…ĺańß ( ¶o*id-**), kija ka knkana qnlaŇčan mwaja baj wada …ĺuwan ¶jokoku uńßan na…ĺux b…ĺańß ( ¶o*id-**) na qnlńßaŇčan w…ônso. llaqi bukuŇčńß alb…ô…ĺt ii u niqan * pnklanan llaqi nija ŇčaŇču ¶: msupu ami…ĺika niqan snaw na ka q…ĺidin mala …ĺoto…ĺo niqan * laqi dńßa: laqi q…ĺidin: …üa*min g…ĺa ¶…ô g…ĺimaldi, kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax * mnsupu toko b…ĺańß qalux wouwa skoki ni ¶ol…ô ¶ost…ô…ĺ niqan * laqi dńßa ŇčaŇču ¶: laqi: al…ôxand…ĺ…ô …ô…ĺi ¶ st*pńßan…ô ¶ost…ô kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** mntutiŇč *…ĺan ¶…ô pa…ĺis st. *in ¶…ônt paul siŇčńßu bjojiŇč. bukuŇčńß alb…ô…ĺt ii tuńßuj ¶a…ĺunni ¶inwaŇč*…ô laqi dńßa u mniq kŇčkawas **** idas ** dijax ** mniq mona ¶o g…ĺa ¶…ô waŇč*…ô bjojiŇč mntutiŇč, * laqi …ĺabu snaw mi * laqi …ĺabu q…ĺidin tn…ĺu…ĺun ka llaqi dńßa. laqi q…ĺidin: gab…ĺi…ôlla tńß*…ĺ*s…ô ma…ĺi…ô, mona ¶o koŇč ¶u, ka…ĺad q…ĺidin po ¶w…ô, tuńßuj swaji nija snaw pa tn…ĺu…ĺun. laqi snaw: '…üa ¶qu…ôs ńßono…ĺ* …ĺaini…ô…ĺ, mana ¶o mnbukuŇč, pawks ńßo ¶w…ô, tuńßuj qbsu…ĺan nija q…ĺidin u tn…ĺu…ĺun. ńßaŇčan snp…ĺuwan ńßaŇčan snp…ĺuwan bukuŇč alb…ô…ĺt ii pa niqan: mona ¶o ¶inwaŇč, wa…ĺw…ôn koŇč ¶w…ô, …ôstut…ô*ill…ô koŇč ¶w…ô, masa…ĺin koŇč ¶w…ô, maj…ôna koŇč ¶w…ô, posaj…ôn ¶Ňčpaw ¶junwaŇč, pawks ńßo ¶w…ô, silima ¶alan ńßo ¶w…ô, ¶iska…ĺ ńßo ¶w…ô, p…ô…ĺli ńßo ¶w…ô, po…ĺinijak po ¶w…ô, kalads po ¶w…ô, *…ôl…ĺit, p…ô…ĺ*u, tan…ônńß…ô…ĺosmoŇčt po ¶w…ô, to…ĺini po ¶w…ô, loŇčk…üw…ômo po ¶w…ô, k…ĺajtaj po ¶w…ô, ka…ĺw…ôn…ô nan ¶w…ô, piji nan ¶w…ô, llusjopi…ĺ nan ¶w…ô, aŇčpiaj nan ¶w…ô, a…ĺt ¶ik nan ¶w…ô, sŇč…ĺo nan ¶w…ô, masaj nan ¶w…ô, isn…ômu …ĺiŇč ¶u, sŇč…ĺ…ômi …ĺiŇč ¶u, matiwoŇč tj…ôn. pnjańßan pnataas **** link k…ô*in i, tan*ania mlikuj
